message.content:
Use Playwright to take a complete visual tour of the NexusAI SaaS at https://nexus-ai-silk-six.vercel.app. 

Take high-quality screenshots (1440x900 viewport) for each step:

**PUBLIC PAGES:**
1. Landing page (/) → save as tour-01-landing.png
2. Scroll down to features section → save as tour-02-features.png  
3. Scroll down to pricing section → save as tour-03-pricing.png
4. Pricing page (/pricing) → save as tour-04-pricing-page.png

**AUTH FLOW:**
5. Login page (/login) → save as tour-05-login.png
6. Login with "testuser@nexusai-test.com" / "TestPassword123!"
7. Wait for dashboard redirect

**DASHBOARD TOUR:**
8. Dashboard overview → save as tour-06-dashboard.png
9. Documents page → save as tour-07-documents.png
10. Upload page → save as tour-08-upload.png
11. Templates page → save as tour-09-templates.png
12. Create Template page (/dashboard/templates/new) → save as tour-10-create-template.png
13. Surveys page → save as tour-11-surveys.png
14. Create Survey page → save as tour-12-create-survey.png
15. Settings/General → save as tour-13-settings.png
16. Team page → save as tour-14-team.png
17. Billing page → save as tour-15-billing.png
18. API Keys page → save as tour-16-api-keys.png

Save all screenshots to C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\test-screenshots\tour\

Make sure the viewport is 1440x900 for desktop quality screenshots. Wait for full page load on each page.

content.text: I'll create a Playwright script to take a complete visual tour of the NexusAI SaaS application. Let me first check the project setup and then create and run the script.

input.description: Check if package.json exists and view it

input.command: npx playwright --version 2>/dev/null || echo "Playwright not found globally"

content.text: Good, Playwright is available. Let me create the output directory and the tour script.

input.description: Run the Playwright visual tour script

### Route Discovery Notes

During the tour, I discovered the actual routes differed from the initial guesses for several pages:
- **Upload**: `/dashboard/documents/upload` (not `/dashboard/upload`)
- **Create Survey**: `/dashboard/surveys/create` (not `/dashboard/surveys/new`)
- **Team**: `/dashboard/settings/team` (not `/dashboard/team`)
- **Billing**: `/dashboard/settings/billing` (not `/dashboard/billing`)
- **API Keys**: `/dashboard/settings/api-keys` (not `/dashboard/api-keys`)

The Settings page (`/dashboard/settings`) required client-side navigation (sidebar click) rather than direct URL navigation due to a Supabase authentication context timing issue when doing a full page load.
